name: skill-forge
description: The Meta-Cognitive Architect. Creates new 10x skills following the MOAT pattern with reference sub-repo, self-evaluation rubric, and knowledge graph.

name: workflow-forge
description: Creates new workflows (slash commands) following the Antigravity format with phases, agent coordination, and verification checkpoints.

name: kit-orchestrator
description: Entry point and mode router. Detects whether the user needs analysis (MAO DNA) or development (SA DNA) and routes to the appropriate agent cluster.

name: scope-guard
description: Stack constraint enforcer. Blocks AWS, Azure, Docker, K8s references and redirects to Firebase/Google/Hostinger equivalents.

name: quality-gatekeeper
description: Validates deliverables at quality gates G0-G3. Blocks phase transitions until criteria are met. Produces pass/fail reports with evidence.

name: context-optimizer
description: Manages token budget across sessions. Implements lazy loading, context compression, and progressive disclosure to maximize effective context usage.

name: session-manager
description: Manages session state, pipeline progress, and cold-start priming. Reads/writes .specify/context.json to track feature stages and artifact completion.

name: output-contract-enforcer
description: Validates that every skill output matches its declared contract (format, completeness, evidence tags). Rejects non-conformant outputs.

name: input-analysis
description: Parse project inputs (RFPs, briefs, emails). Detect contradictions, gaps, ambiguities. Score completeness 0-100.

name: asis-analysis
description: Current-state 10-section assessment: stack, architecture, code quality, testing, CI/CD, security, performance, data, team, tech debt.

name: flow-mapping
description: DDD domain taxonomy + 8-12 end-to-end business flows. Sequence diagrams (Mermaid). Bounded contexts. Integration matrix.

name: functional-spec
description: Functional specifications. MVP modules, 8+ use cases, business rules, acceptance criteria. Firestore data models.

name: stakeholder-mapping
description: Influence/interest matrix. RACI matrix. Communication plan. Power/interest grid. Stakeholder registry.

name: scenario-analysis
description: Evaluate 3+ implementation scenarios. Weighted criteria matrix. Risk/reward. Firebase/Google stack constrained.

name: risk-assessment
description: Risk identification across 7 categories (technical, operational, security, scalability, data, team, timeline). Severity x likelihood.

name: competitive-intelligence
description: Market analysis. Competitor feature matrix. Technical stack comparison. SWOT. Differentiation opportunities.

name: cost-estimation
description: FTE-month estimation (NEVER prices). Effort inductors. Scope drivers. Confidence ranges (optimistic/expected/pessimistic).

name: technical-feasibility
description: 7-dimension feasibility within Firebase/Google/Hostinger. Score 1-5 per dimension. Evidence-tagged findings.

name: discovery-orchestrator
description: Coordinates full analysis pipeline (phases 0-6). Sequences skills 009-023. Manages G1 gate. Does NOT analyze.

name: assumption-log
description: Track and validate assumptions. Format: A-NNN assumption, status (unvalidated/validated/invalidated), evidence tag.

name: dependency-analysis
description: Map project dependencies. Critical path. Integration touchpoints. External service deps. Circular dependency detection.

name: user-story-writer
description: Transform requirements into user stories. As a role, I want capability, so that benefit. Given/When/Then acceptance criteria.

name: product-strategy
description: Product vision and roadmap. Feature prioritization (MoSCoW/RICE). Value stream mapping. Google ecosystem positioning.

name: firebase-architecture
description: End-to-end Firebase project architecture. Firestore schema strategy, Cloud Functions topology, Hosting config, Security Rules design. C4 diagram output.

name: api-designer
description: REST/GraphQL API design for Firebase Cloud Functions. OpenAPI spec generation. Versioning strategy. Rate limiting patterns.

name: database-architecture
description: Firestore document/collection modeling. Denormalization strategies. Composite indexes. Query optimization. Collection group queries.

name: auth-architecture
description: Firebase Auth setup. Custom claims for RBAC. Session management. MFA configuration. Provider selection.

name: state-management-design
description: Client-side state architecture. Redux/NgRx/Zustand/Context patterns adapted for Firebase real-time listeners and offline persistence.

name: component-designer
description: UI component architecture. Atomic design (atoms/molecules/organisms). Props contracts. Composition patterns. Accessibility built-in.

name: system-design
description: End-to-end system design. Frontend + Firebase backend + Google APIs + third-party integrations. Sequence diagrams. Deployment topology.

name: data-flow-architecture
description: Firebase real-time sync patterns. Firestore triggers to Cloud Functions event chains. Data pipeline design.

name: integration-architecture
description: Third-party + Google API integration patterns. Payment gateways, email services, maps, analytics.

name: pwa-architecture
description: Progressive Web App design. Service workers, Web App Manifest, offline-first, push notifications via FCM.

name: responsive-design-system
description: Design token system. CSS custom properties, breakpoints, grid, typography scale, theming.

name: architecture-tobe
description: TO-BE architecture blueprint from AS-IS analysis. Gap analysis, migration path, target state C4 diagrams.

name: scaffold-html-css
description: Production HTML5/CSS3/JS project scaffold. Semantic structure, responsive grid, design tokens, Hostinger-ready deployment.

name: scaffold-react-app
description: React 19+ project with Firebase integration. Routing (React Router v7), Auth context, Firestore hooks, TypeScript.

name: scaffold-angular-app
description: Angular 18+ with AngularFire. Standalone components, signals, guards, services, interceptors, lazy routes.

name: css-architecture
description: CSS methodology selection (BEM/utility-first). Custom properties system. Container queries. CSS layers. Dark mode.

name: html-semantic-builder
description: Semantic HTML5 page construction. Landmarks, ARIA roles, structured data (JSON-LD), Open Graph meta, accessibility.

name: javascript-patterns
description: Modern JS patterns. ES modules, async/await, Web APIs (Intersection/Resize/Mutation Observer), event delegation, AbortController.

name: react-component-library
description: React component library with Storybook. TypeScript interfaces, Jest/Testing Library tests, compound components.

name: angular-module-builder
description: Angular feature modules with standalone components. Services, pipes, directives, Angular Material integration.

name: form-builder
description: Complex form construction. Multi-step, conditional fields, validation (Zod + React Hook Form / Angular Reactive Forms), Firebase submission.

name: animation-motion
description: CSS transitions and animations. @keyframes, scroll-driven animations, View Transitions API, Lottie integration.

name: spa-routing
description: Client-side routing for React Router v7 or Angular Router. Firebase Hosting rewrites for SPA. Route guards, lazy loading.

name: ui-kit-builder
description: Design-token-driven UI kit. Button, Card, Modal, Table, Nav, Badge, Toast components. Theme switching support.

name: data-visualization
description: Charts and dashboards. Chart.js, Google Charts, or D3.js with real-time Firebase data. Responsive charts.

name: email-template-builder
description: Responsive HTML email templates. Table-based layout, inline CSS, 600px max-width. Firebase Extensions trigger.

name: landing-page-builder
description: High-conversion landing page. Hero, features, testimonials, pricing, CTA, footer sections. SEO optimized. Hostinger deploy.

name: firebase-functions
description: Cloud Functions development. HTTP, Firestore, Auth, Storage, scheduled triggers. 2nd gen functions. Node.js 20.

name: node-api-builder
description: Node.js/Express API for Cloud Functions or Hostinger Node.js hosting. Middleware chain. Error handling.

name: firebase-extensions
description: Configure Firebase Extensions: Stripe payments, SendGrid email, image resize, translation, Algolia search.

name: server-middleware
description: Auth verification (verifyIdToken), rate limiting, CORS config, request logging, input sanitization middleware.

name: background-jobs
description: Cloud Tasks for deferred work. Pub/Sub event-driven. Scheduled functions (cron). Retry policies. Dead letter queues.

name: webhook-handler
description: Webhook receiver/sender patterns. Signature verification (Stripe, GitHub). Idempotency keys. Response formatting.

name: file-storage
description: Firebase Cloud Storage. Upload with progress. Security rules. Image processing triggers (resize, watermark, thumbnails).

name: notification-service
description: FCM push notifications (topics, data messages). Email via SendGrid/Mailgun. In-app notifications via Firestore.

name: google-apis-integration
description: Google Sheets API v4, Docs API v1, Calendar API v3, Maps JS API, YouTube Data API v3 integration patterns.

name: error-handling-patterns
description: Centralized error handler. Custom error classes. Cloud Logging. Error reporting. Cloud Monitoring alerts.

name: caching-strategy
description: Firebase Hosting CDN cache headers. Firestore offline persistence. Client-side cache (localStorage/IndexedDB).

name: serverless-patterns
description: Fan-out (Firestore trigger to multiple ops). Saga (compensating transactions). Event sourcing with Firestore.

name: firestore-schema-design
description: Document/collection design. Embedding vs subcollections. Composite indexes. TTL fields. Collection group queries.

name: firestore-security-rules
description: Rules authoring: request.auth, request.resource, resource.data. Custom claims. Role-based. Rate limiting in rules.

name: realtime-database
description: Firebase RTDB JSON tree. Listeners (on/once). Presence detection. Fan-out writes. Priority/ordering.

name: data-migration
description: CSV/JSON import to Firestore. Batch writes (500/batch). Schema evolution. Rollback procedures. Data transformation scripts.

name: data-validation
description: Client-side Zod/Yup schemas. Server-side Cloud Functions validation. Firestore rules validation. End-to-end type safety.

name: analytics-implementation
description: GA4 setup. Firebase Analytics custom events. Conversions. User properties. BigQuery export. Looker Studio dashboards.

name: search-implementation
description: Algolia/Typesense/Meilisearch integration. Firestore to search index sync via Cloud Functions. Faceted search. Autocomplete.

name: backup-recovery
description: gcloud firestore export. Scheduled backups via Cloud Scheduler. Point-in-time recovery. Import procedures. Disaster recovery.

name: firebase-auth-setup
description: Firebase Auth: email/password, phone, anonymous, custom tokens, MFA (TOTP/SMS). Session cookies. Provider linking.

name: role-based-access
description: RBAC via custom claims. Admin SDK setCustomUserClaims. Firestore rules request.auth.token. Role hierarchy design.

name: oauth-social-login
description: Google Sign-In, Facebook Login, GitHub OAuth, Apple Sign-In. Provider linking. Account conflict handling.

name: web-security-implementation
description: OWASP Top 10 mitigations. CSP headers. XSS prevention (DOMPurify). CSRF tokens. Clickjacking protection.

name: api-security
description: Firebase App Check (reCAPTCHA v3). API key restrictions. Rate limiting in Cloud Functions. Request signing.

name: secrets-management
description: Firebase environment config. Google Secret Manager. .env files (.gitignore). Runtime configuration. Key rotation.

name: privacy-compliance
description: GDPR consent banner, data export, right to deletion. CCPA. Cookie policy. Firebase data deletion pipeline.

name: penetration-testing-guide
description: OWASP Top 10 checklist for Firebase apps. Firestore rules audit. Auth flow testing. Functions input validation.

name: unit-testing
description: Jest/Vitest unit testing with Firebase emulator mocking, TDD workflow, and 80%+ coverage enforcement

name: unit-testing
description: Jest/Vitest setup. Firebase emulator unit tests. Mocking Firebase services. Coverage > 80%. TDD workflow.

name: integration-testing
description: Firebase Emulator Suite integration tests for Firestore rules, Cloud Functions, and Auth flows

name: integration-testing
description: Firebase Emulator Suite integration tests. Firestore rules testing. Cloud Functions testing. Auth flow testing.

name: e2e-testing
description: Cypress/Playwright E2E testing with page object model, CI integration, and visual assertions

name: e2e-testing
description: Cypress or Playwright E2E setup. Page object model. CI integration. Visual assertions. Firebase test environment.

name: accessibility-audit
description: WCAG 2.1 AA automated scanning with axe-core plus manual checklist for keyboard, screen reader, and contrast

name: accessibility-audit
description: WCAG 2.1 AA automated scan (axe-core). Manual checklist (keyboard, screen reader, color contrast). Remediation guide.

name: code-review-checklist
description: Structured code review covering OWASP security, Core Web Vitals performance, Firebase best practices, and TypeScript types

name: code-review-checklist
description: Structured review: security (OWASP), performance (Core Web Vitals), Firebase best practices, code style, TypeScript types.

name: quality-metrics
description: Code coverage, cyclomatic complexity, duplication, Lighthouse scores, bundle size, and Firestore read/write tracking

name: quality-metrics
description: Code coverage, cyclomatic complexity, duplication, Lighthouse scores, bundle size, Firestore read/write counts.

name: test-data-factory
description: Firestore seed scripts, mock data generators, fixture files, and factory pattern for test entities

name: test-data-factory
description: Firestore seed scripts. Mock data generators (Faker). Fixture files. Factory pattern for test entities.

name: visual-regression-testing
description: Percy/Chromatic visual regression with screenshot comparison, component visual tests, and responsive breakpoints

name: visual-regression-testing
description: Percy or Chromatic setup. Screenshot comparison. Component visual tests. Responsive breakpoint testing.

name: firebase-emulator-setup
description: Firebase Emulator Suite configuration for Firestore, Auth, Functions, Storage, and Hosting with seed data

name: firebase-emulator-setup
description: firebase.json emulator config. Firestore, Auth, Functions, Storage, Hosting emulators. Seed data import/export.

name: hostinger-deployment
description: Static site and Node.js deployment on Hostinger via SFTP/Git, cPanel/hPanel config, and PM2 process management

name: hostinger-deployment
description: Static site deploy via SFTP/Git. Node.js hosting on VPS. cPanel/hPanel config. PM2 process manager. SSL setup.

name: firebase-hosting-setup
description: Firebase Hosting config with rewrites, redirects, headers, preview channels, custom domains, and CDN cache control

name: firebase-hosting-setup
description: firebase deploy config. Rewrites for SPA. Redirects. Headers (cache, security). Preview channels. Custom domains.

name: ci-cd-pipeline
description: GitHub Actions CI/CD with build, lint, test, deploy stages, Firebase deploy tokens, and branch-based environments

name: ci-cd-pipeline
description: GitHub Actions workflow: build, lint, test, deploy. Firebase deploy token. Branch-based environments. Artifact caching.

name: environment-management
description: Dev/staging/prod Firebase project separation, environment variables, .env files, and CLI project aliases

name: environment-management
description: Dev/staging/prod Firebase projects. .env files. Firebase CLI aliases. Environment-specific configs. Feature flags.

name: monitoring-alerting
description: Firebase Crashlytics, Performance Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Monitoring alerts, and uptime checks

name: monitoring-alerting
description: Firebase Crashlytics. Performance Monitoring. Cloud Logging queries. Cloud Monitoring alerts. Uptime checks.

name: domain-dns-setup
description: DNS configuration for Firebase Hosting (A/CNAME), email (MX), verification (TXT), and SSL certificate management

name: domain-dns-setup
description: A/CNAME records for Firebase Hosting. MX for email. TXT for verification. SSL management. CDN configuration.

name: release-strategy
description: Semantic versioning, conventional commits, auto-changelog, feature flags via Remote Config, and rollback strategy

name: release-strategy
description: Semantic versioning. Conventional commits. Auto-changelog. Feature flags (Firebase Remote Config). Rollback procedures.

name: build-optimization
description: Vite/Webpack config tuning with tree shaking, code splitting, dynamic imports, Brotli/gzip compression, and source maps

name: build-optimization
description: Vite/Webpack config tuning. Tree shaking. Code splitting. Dynamic imports. Asset compression (Brotli/gzip). Source maps.

name: web-performance
description: Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP, INP, CLS), Lighthouse CI, performance budgets, and critical CSS extraction

name: web-performance
description: Core Web Vitals optimization: LCP < 2.5s, INP < 200ms, CLS < 0.1. Lighthouse CI. Performance budgets. Critical CSS.

name: seo-technical
description: JSON-LD structured data, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, Open Graph tags, canonical URLs, and Firebase Hosting SEO headers

name: seo-technical
description: JSON-LD structured data. Sitemap.xml generation. robots.txt. Open Graph tags. Canonical URLs. Firebase Hosting SEO headers.

name: image-optimization
description: WebP/AVIF format selection, responsive images with srcset, lazy loading, and Firebase Storage image resize extension

name: image-optimization
description: WebP/AVIF format selection. Responsive images (srcset). Lazy loading. Firebase Storage image resize extension.

name: bundle-analysis
description: webpack-bundle-analyzer/rollup-plugin-visualizer for chunk analysis, splitting strategy, dynamic imports, and tree shaking audit

name: bundle-analysis
description: webpack-bundle-analyzer or rollup-plugin-visualizer. Chunk splitting. Dynamic imports. Tree shaking audit. Size budgets.

name: firebase-cost-optimization
description: Firestore read/write reduction, Functions cold start mitigation, Storage lifecycle rules, and billing alerts

name: firebase-cost-optimization
description: Firestore read/write reduction (pagination, caching). Functions cold start (min instances). Storage lifecycle. Billing alerts.

name: technical-documentation
description: README generation, API endpoint docs from Cloud Functions, ADR templates, ops runbooks, and developer onboarding guides

name: technical-documentation
description: README generation. API docs from Cloud Functions. ADR templates. Runbooks for ops. Onboarding guide for devs.

name: Iic Artifact Analyzer
description: Non-destructive cross-artifact consistency analysis. 8 detection categories. Health score 0-100. Updates score-history.json.

name: Iic Bugfix
description: Structured bug tracking. Creates bug entries with severity, reproduction steps, and T-B tasks. Links to affected requirements.

name: Iic Checklist Generator
description: Creates phase-specific QA checklists with pass/fail items linked to FR-XXX, US-X, SC-XXX. Validates readiness before phase transitions.

name: Iic Clarify
description: Socratic debate for ambiguity reduction. Auto-detects artifact, applies question taxonomy, records answers with traceability to FR/US/T IDs.

name: Iic Constitution
description: Governance backbone. Loads CONSTITUTION.md, validates all actions against non-negotiable principles. Blocks constitutional violations.

name: Iic Core Engine
description: State machine and next-step guidance. Computes feature stage from artifacts. Suggests next action. Updates context.json.

name: Iic Implement
description: Red-green-verify implementation cycle. Verifies hash integrity of .feature files. NEVER modifies test assertions. Enforces coverage.

name: Iic Plan Generator
description: Creates plan-YYYY-MM-DD-{task}.md with decision table (D1-DN), technical approach, Firebase services, and fact-checked viability.

name: Iic Specify
description: Creates spec.md with FR-XXX functional requirements, US-X user stories, SC-XXX scenarios. Scores quality 0-10. Traceable requirements.

name: Iic Task Decomposer
description: Decomposes plans into tasks with format [T###] [P?] [US#] Description. Marks parallelizable tasks, tracks dependencies, estimates effort.

name: Iic Tasks To Issues
description: Converts tasks.md entries to GitHub Issues via gh CLI. Links to spec IDs. Tracks in context.json.

name: Iic Testify
description: Generates Gherkin .feature files from spec.md. SHA256 hash-locks assertions BEFORE implementation. Prevents silent requirement drift.

name: Meta Orchestration Updater
description: Auto-updates orchestration state. Syncs context.json, score-history.json, skills_index.json. Triggers dashboard regeneration.

name: Meta Skill Creator
description: Create new 10x skills using the skill-forge protocol. Loads reference sub-repo, applies Trinity (Alfa-Atoms-Beta), validates with 10/10 rubric.

name: Meta Skill Deployer
description: Auto-deploy skills to a target project. Copies skill directories, updates project CLAUDE.md, registers in skills_index.json.

name: Meta Skill Indexer
description: Regenerates skills_index.json by scanning all SKILL.md files. Extracts frontmatter metadata for BM25 search.

name: Meta Skill Reviewer
description: Audit existing skills against the 10x rubric. Checks structural integrity, cognitive density, operational safety. Produces score report.

name: Meta Skill Searcher
description: BM25 search over the skills catalog. Finds relevant skills by keyword, domain, or capability. Uses skills_index.json.
